creator: Karim Saad
source_text:
SAVE THIS ‼️ Jersey Mikes Sub in a Tub 🤯 (recipe 👇🏽) 

Announcements:
✅ Want to lose weight without eating boring food? My digital cookbooks include 180+ high-protein recipes with calories and macros included! Grab yours on my site today! 😊
✅ OR Comment “cookbook” and I’ll send you the link! (Macros and Calories Included) 💪🏽
✅ I developed new seasonings for everyday cooking! @spicexseasoning OUT now! 👀

Macros per serving ( makes x3): 457 calories | 42g P | 6g C | 27g F

Ingredients:
1 small head iceberg shredded or 8 oz bag 🥬 
4-6 slices turkey chopped 🦃 
4-6 slices ham chopped 🍖
4-6 slices salami chopped
4-6 slices provolone chopped 🧀 
1/3 cup banana peppers 🌶️ 
12 cherry tomatoes sliced 🍅 
1/2 red onion, thinly sliced 🧅 

For the Dressing:
1/2 cup nonfat yogurt 
2 tablespoons light mayonnaise
4-5 tablespoons red wine vinegar
1 1/2 teaspoon oregano 🌿 
Salt & Pepper, to taste 🧂 

If you want weekly recipes and discounts straight to your email inbox every Sunday then comment “newsletter” 😌📧
.
.
.
.
#icekarim #healthyrecipes #easyrecipes #mealprep #quickrecipes

notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
The acquired description provides ingredients but no preparation instructions, so this is intentionally an incomplete fallback case.
Accepted after general decorated-save title, x-prefixed yield, and announcements-heading handling; no creator identity or exact recipe phrase is used.
